title: Entrepreneurial Negotiation
author: Barry Nalebuff
subline: Eight moves for a winning position.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 4x4 negotiation matrix. The top-right cell is RED — the optimal outcome. Title sits in the bottom 1/3. -->
  <g transform="translate(220 320)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <text x="0" y="-30" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">PRICE →</text>
    <text x="-50" y="1180" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em" transform="rotate(-90 -50 1180)">VALUE ↑</text>
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="1160" height="1160"/>
      <line x1="290" y1="0" x2="290" y2="1160"/>
      <line x1="580" y1="0" x2="580" y2="1160"/>
      <line x1="870" y1="0" x2="870" y2="1160"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="290" x2="1160" y2="290"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="580" x2="1160" y2="580"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="870" x2="1160" y2="870"/>
    </g>
    <g font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.12em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="145" y="160">WALK</text>
      <text x="435" y="160">CONCEDE</text>
      <text x="725" y="160">TRADE</text>
      <text x="1015" y="160">ASK</text>
      <text x="145" y="450">FOLD</text>
      <text x="435" y="450">HOLD</text>
      <text x="725" y="450">SWAP</text>
      <text x="1015" y="450">PUSH</text>
      <text x="145" y="740">EXIT</text>
      <text x="435" y="740">WAIT</text>
      <text x="725" y="740">MOVE</text>
      <text x="1015" y="740">RAISE</text>
      <text x="145" y="1030">CUT</text>
      <text x="435" y="1030">PAUSE</text>
      <text x="725" y="1030">OFFER</text>
      <text x="1015" y="1030">CLOSE</text>
    </g>
    <rect x="870" y="0" width="290" height="290" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="1015" cy="195" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <path d="M 30 1130 Q 600 1300 1015 230" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="2 4" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Negotiation as a 4x4 matrix — Nalebuff's framework. Sixteen cells labeled with verbs (WALK, ASK, PUSH, CLOSE, etc.). The top-right cell — the optimal outcome — is the only red one, with a red dot and a dashed arrow tracing the path from start. Title sits in the bottom 1/3, weight 500 command. Brand 'NEGOTIATION' in the top-left; pill '8 MOVES' for the book's eight-move framework.
